# Project Overview

This is the main project document. It describes the architecture and goals.

## Architecture

The system uses a [[microservices]] approach with [[event-driven]] communication.
See [[api-gateway]] for the entry point.

## Goals

1. Build a scalable platform
2. Support real-time updates
3. Maintain high availability
